summary: Testiran dual rezervacijski sistem (table vs room tipovi). Pronađena i popravljena 2 kritična buga. Backend: 14/14 testova prošlo. Frontend: sve funkcionalnosti rade. Business panel: expandovane kartice ispravno prikazuju detalje za oba tipa rezervacije.

critical.issue: FIXED: Response je nedostajao reservation_type, check_in_date, check_out_date, room_type, bed_type, table_preference. Mobilna app 'Moje rezervacije' uvijek prikazivala stolni format jer isRoom provjera (r.reservation_type === 'room') uvijek vraćala false.

minor.issue: Sličan problem: response nedostaje reservation_type, check_in_date, check_out_date, room_type, bed_type, table_preference - admin panel može ne prikazivati room detalje ispravno

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Date block koristio r.date za room rezervacije gdje je date=null, uzrokujući NaN prikaz. Popravak: uvjetno koristi r.check_in_date za room tip. Rebuild izvršen i deployovan.

action_items: Fix /api/admin/reservations to include reservation_type, check_in_date, check_out_date, room_type, bed_type, table_preference fields (same fix as my-reservations)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: get_my_reservations response dict missing fields: reservation_type, check_in_date, check_out_date, room_type, bed_type, table_preference. All added to response.
FIXED: Business panel Reservations.tsx date block - r.date is null for room reservations, now uses check_in_date conditionally. Purple block for room, emerald for table.
Minor: get_admin/reservations also missing reservation_type and room/table specific fields - may affect admin panel views
No testID attributes on interactive elements in ReservationsTab.tsx (TouchableOpacity for filter chips, location cards, form buttons) - would improve future testability

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All verified: location list with cards, filter chips (Sve/Restorani/Kafici/Prenocista), table form (date/time/guests/preference), hotel form (check-in/out/room-type/bed-type), end-to-end submission+verification, business panel reservation display with expanded details

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* reservation entries created during testing (not cleaned up - 22 total in panel from various test iterations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual reservation system (table/room) fully tested and bugs fixed. Backend POST /api/reservations works for both types. Business panel at /api/business-panel/ (NOT /business/). Room reservations show purple date block with check_in_date, table reservations show emerald date block with date. Expanded cards: table shows DATUM I VRIJEME + PREFERENCIJA STOLA; room shows DOLAZAK/ODLAZAK + nights + SMJEŠTAJ (room_type/bed_type). my-reservations endpoint now returns all fields including reservation_type for both types. Admin reservations endpoint still missing these fields.
rca_of_issue: BUG 1 - get_my_reservations: Response dict hardcoded fields from table-only era (date/time/guests) without reservation_type, check_in_date, check_out_date, room_type, bed_type, table_preference. ReservationsTab.tsx 'isRoom' check always false → room reservations displayed as table format with empty fields. Fix: added all missing fields to response dict. BUG 2 - Business panel date block: new Date(r.date + 'T12:00:00') where r.date=null for rooms → Invalid Date → NaN. Fix: conditional date selection (r.check_in_date for room, r.date for table) with validity check. Rebuild + deploy of business-panel-dist.

test_verification.mobile_table_reservation_e2e: PASS - submit → code → verify → success screen
test_verification.business_panel_table_card: PASS - shows date/time in emerald block
test_verification.business_panel_room_card_nan_fixed: PASS - shows check_in_date in purple block, no NaN
test_verification.business_panel_room_expanded_dolazak_odl: PASS - shows date range + nights count
